sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root נָסָה), plur. מַסֹּות temptation, trials; used of-

(1) the great deeds of God, by which he would both prove and excite the faith of his people, Deuter. 4:34 7:19 29:2 . On the other hand-

(2) a temptation of Jehovah is i.q. a complaining against him, Psa 95:8 whence [Massah], the pr.n. of a place in the desert מַסָּה Exo 17:7 Deu 6:16 9:22 33:8 .

(3) calamity, by which God tries any one, πειρασμός, N. T., Job 9:23.
